message:
chore(beads): Enhance bd-19y9 EPIC with resilience and crash-safety features

Updates 4 beads with comprehensive enhancements:

- bd-19y9.2.1: Add complete GitHub Actions workflow YAML for installer
  notification receiver (validate-dispatch, verify-checksum, security-scan,
  update-checksums, create-pr, handle-removal jobs)

- bd-19y9.1.4: Add Claude API resilience features (circuit breaker with
  configurable thresholds, token bucket rate limiter, exponential backoff
  with jitter, cost tracking and limits, Prometheus metrics)

- bd-19y9.1.5: Add systemd hardening (watchdog integration with NOTIFY_SOCKET,
  Type=notify service, resource limits for memory/CPU/IO, security hardening
  with ProtectSystem=strict, system call filtering, restart policies)

- bd-19y9.3.3: Add crash-safe persistence (explicit fsync via Python/dd,
  atomic write with rename, record checksums for integrity verification,
  state integrity check on startup, automatic repair of corrupted entries)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
